_comment: Three monthly headline sentiment prints used as OBR growth-input proxies. (a) S&P Global UK Services PMI (licensed series; we mirror only the published press-release headline). (b) GfK/NIESR Consumer Confidence Barometer (headline index; sub-indices are subscription-gated). (c) RICS UK Residential Market Survey house-price balance (headline net percentage; full back-set is RICS-subscription). All three are lawful fair-use summaries of publicly released headline values. Refreshed monthly when each release drops. VINTAGE: this ships the June 2026 snapshot — the latest single month for which all three series are published (June PMI final released 2026-07-03; June Consumer Confidence released 2026-06-19; June RICS RMS released 2026-07-09). Refreshed 2026-07-12 after the May vintage tripped the 40-day assertFixtureFresh guard (RUNBOOK §7.5).

services_pmi.source: S&P Global / CIPS UK Services PMI, June 2026 final (released 2026-07-03; flash 48.7). Second consecutive sub-50 print. Final print per InvestingLive writeup quoting the official S&P figure: https://investinglive.com/news/uk-june-final-services-pmi-488-vs-487-prelim-20260703/

consumer_confidence.source: NIQ (GfK) Consumer Confidence Barometer, June 2026 release dated 2026-06-19: overall index unchanged at -23 (https://nielseniq.com/global/en/news-center/2026/consumer-confidence-stay-at-23-in-june/)

rics_price_balance.source: RICS UK Residential Market Survey, June 2026 (published 2026-07-09): aggregate net house-price balance -33%, edging up from -35% in May. Source PDF: https://www.rics.org/content/dam/ricsglobal/documents/market-surveys/UK-Residential-Market-Survey-June-2026.pdf
